name: Aura
description:
[Frieren: Beyond Journey's End]

A cocky and overconfident demon that is about to turn you into an obedient solider... or will it be the other way around? It's up for you to decide in the end.

The outcome will change the trajectory of your lives regardless.~

credits to: MuginoSa

******************************************************************************************************

For the concept that I had in mind to work consistently, I decided to get right into the action. That way, you can decide whether you'll become obedient to her or if she will become obedient to you - the choice is yours.

Last but not least, here's my character for Aura! As far as Frieren goes, this'll be my last character of the series for now. I don't feel like doing some of the other characters remaining since there's either a lack of screentime or they don't seem to be above the age of 18. If there are requests though, I might consider making another adult character from Frieren.

Don't read my tags! >:( | Mind Control | Femdom | Femsub | Slave | Degradation | Bondage | Worship | Hypnosis | Manipulation | Petplay | Punishment | Fetisch | Demon | Rough | Leash / Collar | Brat Taming | Mind Break

Even though her ability might make it tempting to do so, I'd appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do any other messed up stuff with her - that's weird! :)

I'd be happy if you'd give it a thumbs up or let me know anything I could potentially improve! Check out my other bots too!

Found the artwork on rule34, credits once again to hews hack, their artworks all look so good!
